about.title: Bringing fairness to work in the Netherlands.
about.description: GoNL is not just another job portal. We are a digital bridge between you and the best Dutch employers. Our goal is total transparency – from the first click in the calculator to signing the contract directly in the app.
about.feature1_desc: What you see in the calculator is what you get. No paycheck surprises.
about.feature2_desc: Handle everything from your mobile. From identity verification to uploading your ticket.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about working in the Netherlands, the BSN process, and your arrival.
faq.cta_desc: Write to us at info@gonl.app and we'll reply within 24 hours.

q1.q: How does the BSN process work?
q1.a: In GoNL.app, it's fully digital and stress-free. Once the agency confirms your appointment, the Roadmap section will display a QR code and the exact meeting time at the NL office. Simply show this code from your mobile on-site. The app will also navigate you there.

q2.q: Why do I need to upload my ID/passport?
q2.a: Dutch laws and agency security protocols require it. Your data is encrypted and used exclusively for identity verification and preparing your employment contract.

q3.q: Do I pay for job placement?
q3.a: No. GoNL.app is 100% free for candidates. We do not charge any hidden fees or commissions from your wages.

q4.q: When will I receive my first paycheck?
q4.a: Most our partner agencies pay wages weekly. Typically expect your first money after your second week of work.

q5.q: Who pays for the ticket to the Netherlands?
q5.a: You buy the ticket yourself initially and upload it to the app. Important: Most of our partners will reimburse your travel costs in your first or second paycheck. Keep your original ticket safe!

q6.q: Where will I live in the Netherlands?
q6.a: Agencies provide SNF-certified accommodation. Usually shared houses or apartments within reasonable distance from work.
